---
title: "Initial Website Completed"
description: "This page can serve as a portal for Public Safety operations support"
author:
  - name: Brandon Stark
    affiliation: UC Center of Excellence on UAS Safety
    affiliation-url: https://ucdrones.github.io/
date: "03-04-2026"
categories: [Quarto, R, UAS]
page-navigation: true
sidebar: true

---


The initial version of this website is now live.

At this stage, content is intentionally limited. The primary materials currently available focus on **insurance coverage** and **shielded BVLOS operations** applicable to University of California public safety UAS activity.

### Current Content

- **Insurance information**
  - UC UAS liability coverage
  - Physical damage coverage
  - Claim and documentation requirements
  - Coverage considerations for campus police operations

- **Shielded BVLOS Operations**
  - UC Public Safety Organization Shielded Operations Waiver
  - Eligibility and operational scope
  - Required training and registration
  - Post‑flight documentation requirements

Additional content will be added incrementally as materials are developed and reviewed. This site is intended to serve as a practical reference point for public safety UAS operations across the UC system.
